chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1064 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Sulleman Unar, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh ----- Petitioner’s Counsel states that the Petitioner was promoted from BPS-1 to BPS-11 in the year 2020. That aspect of the matter was however confronted and the learned AAG categorically states that as per the fresh comments filed by Respondent No.3, such promotion was illegally done and the same was withdrawn/cancelled vide Office Letter dated 05.04.2025, it has been filed along with the fresh comments. Since it is a fresh cause of action, the Counsel for Petitioner agrees to withdraw the Petition and avail his remedies according to law. In view of above, the Petition stands disposed of as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
